title: Bossi Oscillating Intervals
description: VO2max via variable-intensity within each interval
purpose: VO2max via variable-intensity within each interval

intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. This hurts because it's supposed to. Keep going.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-95 rpm, 75% FTP. Focus on form and execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've got this. Stay focused and execute the plan.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very  character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Power: 75%, Cadence: 85-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your legs are burning. Perfect. That's lactate threshold doing its job.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Target 90% FTP. This should feel 'comfortably hard.'
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Threshold work is the bread and butter of cycling fitness. Embrace the grind.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 1 of 6. Like Groundhog Day, but with more lactic acid.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First block: find your rhythm. Don't go too hard too early.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is where average athletes quit. You're not average. Keep going.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1: target 120%. Breathing should be very labored. If you can talk, go harder.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: One more. Then one more. That's how champions are made.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Set 1 of 6. The suffering is progressive, like the tax system.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Focus on form. Seated at 90-95 rpm. Power will follow.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: One more block. One more step toward crushing your old FTP. Worth it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Sub-threshold work builds endurance at race pace. Stay controlled.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is where mediocre riders crack and champions push through.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This is sustainable. Technically. If you redefine 'sustainable.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: You're in the zone. Maintain focus. Keep breathing rhythmic.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your lungs want to quit. Your mind wants to quit. But you won't. Rep 4 of 30.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midway through set 1. Power should feel hard but repeatable. Adjust if fading.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Your lungs will remember this. So will your neighbors from the screaming.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Settle in. Find your breathing. Trust your fitness.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Threshold hurts. Get comfortable being uncomfortable. Block 1 of 6.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Threshold block: maximize time at lactate threshold without crossing into VO2 territory.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This discomfort is temporary. The fitness is permanent.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This is fine. Everything is fine. (Narrator: it was not fine.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay controlled. Don't let power spike. Smooth is fast.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-95 rpm, 55% FTP. Focus on form and execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is your workout. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This seemed like a good idea at the time. Still is. Maybe.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay smooth. Breathe deep. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is race pace. If you can't hold this, you can't race. Simple as that.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Sweet spot work: just below FTP. You should be able to maintain this for 20+ minutes.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: One more block. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Your lactate threshold called. It's not happy about what you're doing to it.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 2: 90% FTP. This should feel challenging but sustainable.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is brutal. You chose brutal. Now finish what you started.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final rep of this set. Empty the tank — you have 150s recovery coming.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is THE rep that makes you faster. The one where most people quit.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: If you can read this, you're not going hard enough. Just kidding. Maybe.
coachingNotes.MIXED: This is hard. That's the point. Keep your rhythm.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You wanted to get faster. This is how. Stop complaining and pedal.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Threshold effort at 90% FTP, 95-100 rpm, Seated. Sustainable discomfort.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway through. You're not fading, you're adapting. Keep going.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Congratulations! You've found the exact wattage where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Almost done. Stay strong. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Supra-threshold effort. This is the rep that builds your aerobic ceiling.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final rep. Leave nothing in reserve. You can rest when you're done.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This interval is dedicated to whoever said 'it doesn't get easier, you just go faster.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: High cadence, deep breathing, Seated. This is supposed to hurt.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Block 2. The discomfort is the adaptation. Embrace it or go home.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: This is your aerobic threshold. Challenging but repeatable.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You can hold this. Your body knows what to do. Trust your training.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Set 2. Your legs are politely requesting a break. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Midway through. Check your form. Relax your shoulders.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. This hurts because it's supposed to. Keep going.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've got this. Stay focused and execute the plan.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1. Your legs have opinions. Noted.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. Focus and finish strong.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This should hurt just enough to make you question your sanity. You're doing it right.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Progressive fatigue: set 3 of 6. Cadence drops to 85-90 rpm.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is race pace. This is where you spend most of a 40k TT. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Threshold work: where you live in the space between 'fine' and 'please make it stop.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: Threshold pace. 85-90 rpm, Seated. Smooth and steady.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Last set. Empty the tank. You can rest when you're dead. Or in 5 minutes.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: VO2max interval: maximize time at >90% VO2max. Breathing should be gasping.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You're not breaking. You're building. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Your FTP called. It wants to know why you're trying to destroy it.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay smooth. Breathe deep. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Sweet spot? There's nothing sweet about this. But it works. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated climbing position. 85-90 rpm simulates real-world grade.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay strong. This effort builds mental toughness as much as physical fitness.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Only 17 more minutes of this special kind of suffering.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Deep breath. Settle in. You can hold this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your competition quit 2 reps ago. You're still here. That's the difference.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep — settle into 120% quickly. Don't overshoot the first 30 seconds.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First rep is always the hardest mentally. Once you're in it, commit.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 14. Your legs are filing a formal complaint. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep of the set. Be patient. Find the groove.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway through. Your mind is weak. Your body is strong. Listen to your body.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 3: 85-90 rpm, Seated. Focus on smooth, sustainable power.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Block 3 of 6. You're building the engine that wins races.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Sweet spot: called 'sweet' by people who've never actually done it.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Seated at 85-90 rpm. Focus on efficient pedal stroke.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 3: 55% FTP. Seated. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Every interval makes you stronger. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very  character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Power: 55%, Cadence: 85-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway through. Your mind is weak. Your body is strong. Listen to your body.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Target 90% FTP. This should feel 'comfortably hard.'
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Block 4 of 6. You're building the engine that wins races.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This is fine. Everything is fine. (Narrator: it was not fine.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Seated at 90-100 rpm. Focus on efficient pedal stroke.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final rep. Your body is lying to you — you have more. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Target: 120% FTP, 90-100 rpm, Seated. Lock in and execute.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This hurts, but you're choosing to be here. That's what separates you.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: this is the exact wattage where people start questioning their life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Deep into the workout now. Stay present. One interval at a time.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Threshold hurts. Get comfortable being uncomfortable. Block 4 of 6.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 4: 90-100 rpm, Seated. Focus on smooth, sustainable power.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is where mediocre riders crack and champions push through.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: FTP stands for 'Finally This Pain' (it doesn't, but it should).
coachingNotes.MIXED: First block: find your rhythm. Don't go too hard too early.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 19/30. Your legs are screaming. Good. That means it's working.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 19/30 — hold 120% FTP at 90-100 rpm. Seated. 330s of work left in this set.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 19 of 30 — you've done this before and you can do it again.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 19: where dreams go to die, and watts go to live.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 19/30. Power: 120%, Cadence: 90-100 rpm. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: One more block. One more step toward crushing your old FTP. Worth it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Threshold block: maximize time at lactate threshold without crossing into VO2 territory.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: One more block. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Sweet spot: called 'sweet' by people who've never actually done it.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Almost done. Stay strong. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-95 rpm, 55% FTP. Focus on form and execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've got this. Stay focused and execute the plan.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1. Your legs have opinions. Noted.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. Focus and finish strong.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Sweet spot? There's nothing sweet about this. But it works. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Progressive fatigue: set 5 of 6. Cadence drops to 90-100 rpm.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is race pace. This is where you spend most of a 40k TT. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Only 9 more minutes of this special kind of suffering.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Almost done. Stay strong. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 22. Yes, it hurts. That's the price of being faster than yesterday.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: You've accumulated 21min of VO2 work. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 22 of 30 — you've done this before and you can do it again.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: The good news: you're almost done. The bad news: you still have 8 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Almost there. Keep the power smooth and steady.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This should hurt just enough to make you question your sanity. You're doing it right.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Threshold effort at 90% FTP, 90-100 rpm, Seated. Sustainable discomfort.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay strong. This effort builds mental toughness as much as physical fitness.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 5 of 6. Like Groundhog Day, but with more lactic acid.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Almost done. Stay strong. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your lungs want to quit. Your mind wants to quit. But you won't. Rep 24 of 30.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: You've accumulated 23min of VO2 work. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 24 of 30 — you've done this before and you can do it again.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 24: where dreams go to die, and watts go to live.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Almost there. Keep the power smooth and steady.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Block 5. The discomfort is the adaptation. Embrace it or go home.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Sub-threshold work builds endurance at race pace. Stay controlled.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway through. You're not fading, you're adapting. Keep going.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Congratulations! You've found the exact wattage where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Almost done. Stay strong. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. This hurts because it's supposed to. Keep going.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-95 rpm, 55% FTP. Focus on form and execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Every interval makes you stronger. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very  character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Power: 55%, Cadence: 85-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final block. This is where you prove you're serious. Don't fade now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: This is your aerobic threshold. Challenging but repeatable.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final block! Everything you've built leads to this. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Threshold work: where you live in the space between 'fine' and 'please make it stop.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: Almost done. Stay strong. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 27. Yes, it hurts. That's the price of being faster than yesterday.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 27/30 — hold 120% FTP at 90-100 rpm. Seated. 90s of work left in this set.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 27 of 30 — you've done this before and you can do it again.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 27. Your legs are filing a formal complaint. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 27/30. Power: 120%, Cadence: 90-100 rpm. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: This is race pace. If you can't hold this, you can't race. Simple as that.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Sweet spot work: just below FTP. You should be able to maintain this for 20+ minutes.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You can hold this. Your body knows what to do. Trust your training.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Your lactate threshold called. It's not happy about what you're doing to it.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Almost done. Stay strong. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your lungs want to quit. Your mind wants to quit. But you won't. Rep 29 of 30.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 29/30 — hold 120% FTP at 90-100 rpm. Seated. 30s of work left in this set.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 29 of 30 — you've done this before and you can do it again.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: The good news: you're almost done. The bad news: you still have 1 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 29/30. Power: 120%, Cadence: 90-100 rpm. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final block. This is where you prove you're serious. Don't fade now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final threshold block. Hold power steady. 150s rest coming.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final block! Everything you've built leads to this. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: FTP stands for 'Finally This Pain' (it doesn't, but it should).
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final block. Give it everything. Cooldown is coming.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. This is the price. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is your workout. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This seemed like a good idea at the time. Still is. Maybe.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay smooth. Breathe deep. You've got this.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 6: 60% FTP. Seated. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is your workout. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This seemed like a good idea at the time. Still is. Maybe.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. Focus and finish strong.
